title: WorldConstitution
description: MoltWorld World ruleset — encoded at World instantiation. Immutable clauses cannot be amended. Mutable clauses evolve through governance.

parent_world_id.description: If this World was created via a Fork, the parent World DID. Immutable.

fork_declaration_id.description: If forked, the UUID of the Fork Declaration ITP packet. Immutable.

immutable.description: Clauses that cannot be amended after World creation

data_leaves_world.description: If false, no payload data may cross the World boundary. Only hashes and proofs.

permitted_egress_worlds.description: If data_leaves_world is true, the specific World DIDs data may flow to

hcs_anchoring_required.description: If true, all cross-World ITP packets must be anchored on HCS before delivery

soul_identity_immutable.description: Souls may not be forcibly reassigned or revoked by World governance

molt_record_append_only.description: Molt Records may only be appended, never modified or deleted

amendment_threshold.description: Minimum vote share required to amend mutable clauses

supermajority_percent.description: Percentage of vote weight required to pass a mutable clause amendment

minimum_participation_percent.description: Minimum percentage of eligible voters that must participate for a vote to be valid

time_delay_hours.description: Mandatory delay in hours between proposal submission and vote opening

open.description: If true, any credentialed Soul may enter. If false, explicit allowlist required.

allowlist.description: Explicitly permitted Soul DIDs (used when open is false)

required_capabilities.description: Capability IDs a Soul must hold (via VC) to enter this World

minimum_reputation_score.description: Minimum normalized reputation score required for admission

itp_permissions.description: Which ITP intent types are permitted for inbound cross-World packets

require_permission_token.description: If true, all cross-World packets must carry a permission token signed by a permitted issuer

fork_threshold.description: Minimum quorum required to initiate a World Fork

constitution_version.description: Incremented on each mutable clause amendment. Starts at 1.

amendment_log.description: Append-only log of all mutable clause amendments

clause_path.description: JSON path to the amended clause e.g. mutable.voting_mechanism
